device_target_fallback: ibm_brisbane (Eagle r3) or any Open-Plan-eligible Heron

circuit_design.rationale_delay_choice: 0 = baseline (no decoherence); 25us = Penrose-Hameroff predicted neuronal microtubule coherence threshold (Hameroff 1998 ~1-25ms reframed at SC scale); 50us & 100us = bracket IBM Heron T2 median (~80us); 200us = stress test beyond device T2.

measurement_observable.primary: P(0000) — probability all qubits return to |0> after delay + reverse-bell. Pure decoherence collapses GHZ off-diagonal, suppressing P(0000) toward 1/16.
measurement_observable.expected_relation: tau_2_eff < tau_2_single_qubit by factor ~N (decoherence accelerated for entangled superposition; this is itself a textbook QM prediction that Orch-OR builds on)

F_N12_1_ratio_test.denominator_primary_source: IBM Heron r2 fleet typical single-qubit T2
F_N12_1_ratio_test.denominator_robustness_source: Nature Communications 2025 SOTA tantalum transmon T2_echo
F_N12_1_ratio_test.predicted_ratio_under_orch_or_with_objec: could deviate if OR threshold reached; magnitude depends on E_G of microtubule analog — not directly testable on SC, but the SC measurement establishes the textbook baseline for cross-substrate comparison
F_N12_1_ratio_test.fail_outside_band: ratio > 0.40 OR < 0.15 -> deviation from textbook 4Q GHZ decoherence

cost.fallback_paid_estimate_USD: $1.60/sec * 60 sec = $96 worst case if Open Plan exhausted; still under v1 actual spend $24.90

verifier_update.old_verifier_v1: ratio in [0.67, 1.5] using surrogate rx(2pi)*N as wait — REJECTED, methodology flaw
verifier_update.new_verifier_v3: ratio in [0.15, 0.40] using OpenQASM 3 native delay[Nus] — methodologically sound on substrate that supports delay
verifier_pass_conditions: 3. P(0000) decay fit converges with R^2 >= 0.85
4. Extracted tau_2_eff in physically sensible range (1us to 1ms)

5. ratio = tau_2_eff / 100us within [0.15, 0.40] -> textbook QM PASS, no Orch-OR signal at 4Q GHZ scale (NULL result is the expected scientific outcome — Orch-OR predicts neuronal-scale, not SC-scale, OR)
verifier_indeterminate_conditions: ibm_kingston offline -> retry on alternate Heron

no_writes_to: alpha pod, nexus, GPU pods (HEXA-only research mode)
